title: GitHub Review by gndrmnn
summary: The reviewer wants the helper function at `operators/keystone/internal/controller/reconcile_dbconnection_secret.go:177` moved into the existing `secrets.go` module.

code_comments.body: Move this helper to the existing secrets.go module
code_comments.author: gndrmnn
code_comments.resolution: Removed the local `isMissingSecretOrKey` function (previously at reconcile_dbconnection_secret.go:177) and added an exported `IsMissingSecretOrKey` in internal/common/secrets/secrets.go; updated both call sites in reconcile_dbconnection_secret.go to use `secrets.IsMissingSecretOrKey` and dropped the now-unused `errors` import.

resolution_summary: The `isMissingSecretOrKey` helper was moved from `operators/keystone/internal/controller/reconcile_dbconnection_secret.go` into the shared `internal/common/secrets/secrets.go` module as an exported `IsMissingSecretOrKey` function, preserving the sentinel-based detection logic (apierrors.IsNotFound + errors.Is(ErrKeyNotFound)). The two call sites in the Keystone DB-connection reconciler were updated to invoke `secrets.IsMissingSecretOrKey(err)`, and the now-unused `errors` import was dropped from the controller file. No changes were made outside the locations named in the review.
